definitions.text: True facts, genuine depiction or statements of reality.
examples: The truth is that our leaders knew a lot more than they were letting on.

definitions.text: Conformity to fact or reality; correctness, accuracy.
examples: There was some truth in his statement that he had no other choice.

definitions.text: The state or quality of being true to someone or something.
examples: Truth to one's own feelings is all-important in life.

definitions.text: To assert as true; to declare; to speak truthfully.
To make exact; to correct for inaccuracy.
